heading: Why Product Images Drive Sales
text: In e-commerce, product images are your most powerful sales tool. Studies show that 75% of online shoppers rely on product photos when making purchase decisions. High-quality images build trust, reduce return rates, and directly increase conversion rates.

heading: Recommended Sizes and Formats
text: For main product images, use dimensions between 1000 and 2000 pixels on the longest side. This provides enough resolution for zoom functionality without being excessively large. Most e-commerce platforms recommend 1200 x 1200 or 1500 x 1500 pixels for square product images.

heading: Image SEO for E-commerce
text: Search engines cannot see your images, but they read the text you associate with them. jpg provide no useful information.

heading: Optimizing Product Images with ToolPic
text: Start by cropping your product photos to a consistent aspect ratio using ToolPic's Image Crop tool. Square crops (1:1) work best for most e-commerce platforms and ensure a clean, uniform grid layout in category pages. Crop tightly around the product to maximize the visual impact at smaller display sizes.
